description_long: This object is a modern grave monument set on a rectangular stone base. The main feature is a pair of upright, polished black stone slabs at one end, one taller than the other, with a narrow vertical gap between them and a horizontal bar crossing the gap, forming a minimalist cross. The grave's body consists of a two-tiered, rectangular slab of gray granite, slightly raised above the base platform. The base itself is a larger, flat, light-gray stone that extends beyond the grave, providing a clean border. The materials appear to be high-quality polished granite and marble, giving the monument a sleek, contemporary appearance. There are no visible inscriptions or decorative motifs, emphasizing a minimalist and solemn design.
description: A modern grave monument with upright black stone slabs forming a cross, set on a two-tiered gray granite base with a wide stone border.
description_view_0: Front view shows the two upright black slabs with a cross formed by a horizontal bar, and the layered gray stone base.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thickness of the upright slabs and the layered structure of the grave's body.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the black slabs and the full length of the gray granite grave cover.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the depth of the grave and the clean, rectangular lines of the base and monument.
